name: edusmart-monorepo
description: EduSmart - Plateforme de gestion scolaire intelligente (monorepo backend/frontend/ai-service)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r ai-service/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,AI -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
